_description: Mathematical patterns extracted from 46 machine models across 8 product lines

dimension_1_price_vs_area._insight: Price scales with forming area, but follows a POWER LAW (not linear) for most series. Larger machines cost more total but less per m².

PF1-C.interpretation: Sub-linear scaling — doubling area only increases price ~40%

PF1-X.interpretation: Sub-linear scaling — doubling area increases price ~47%

PF2.interpretation: Near-perfect power law fit — very predictable pricing

IMG.interpretation: High fixed cost (₹11.7M base) + modest area scaling — technology-driven pricing

FCS.interpretation: Steepest area scaling of any series — multi-station complexity

UNO.interpretation: Very flat scaling — price barely changes with size

dimension_2_servo_vs_pneumatic._insight: All-servo (X) machines cost 3.04x pneumatic (C) on average. The premium is remarkably stable across sizes.
dimension_2_servo_vs_pneumatic.trend: Slight increase with size (0.067 per m²) but low R²=0.083 — essentially flat at ~3x

dimension_3_station_count_premium._insight: Adding a 4th station to FCS costs a flat ₹2.5M regardless of size, but the percentage premium drops for larger machines.

dimension_4_heater_premium._insight: Twin heater adds 9% (₹0.5M) to UNO at same forming area. Modest premium for doubled heating capacity.

dimension_5_economies_of_scale._insight: Price per m² drops dramatically with size. A 6m² PF1-C costs 68% less per m² than a 0.8m² PF1-C.

dimension_6_technology_tiers._insight: 8 distinct technology tiers with wildly different price/m² — from ₹1.4M/m² (PF2) to ₹38.1M/m² (FCS). Technology complexity, not size, is the primary price driver.

dimension_7_heater_power_correlation._insight: Heater power (kW) is a strong proxy for price in specialized series. FCS and IMG show near-perfect correlation (R²>0.98).

quick_estimation_rules._description: Rules of thumb Ira can use for quick price estimation
rules: PF1-C: Start at ₹3.3M for 0.8m², add ~₹1M per additional m²
PF1-X: Take PF1-C price and multiply by 3.0x
PF2: Start at ₹2.3M base, add ₹0.67M per m² — cheapest per m²
FCS: ₹10M base for 3-station, +₹2.5M for 4th station, +50% for servo
IMG: ₹11.7M base + ₹2.4M per m² — high fixed cost, modest scaling
UNO: ~₹5-6M regardless of size, +9% for twin heater
DUO: ~₹5.5-6.5M, slight premium over UNO for dual station
